metadata.story_summary: Verify if multi-factor authentication (MFA) is enabled for a user's account.

user_story: "As a user I want to verify if the multi factor authenication is set for my account."

test_cases.title: Check MFA status when MFA is enabled
test_cases.description: Verify that the system correctly indicates MFA is enabled when the user has set it up.
preconditions: User has enabled MFA on their account

steps.action: Navigate to the account security settings page
steps.expected_result: Account security settings page is displayed

test_cases.expected_outcome: User is informed that MFA is enabled on their account

test_cases.title: Check MFA status when MFA is disabled
test_cases.description: Verify that the system correctly indicates MFA is disabled when the user has not set it up.
preconditions: User has not enabled MFA on their account

steps.action: Navigate to the account security settings page
steps.expected_result: Account security settings page is displayed

test_cases.expected_outcome: User is informed that MFA is not enabled on their account

test_cases.title: Check MFA status after enabling MFA
test_cases.description: Verify that after enabling MFA, the status updates correctly to enabled.

steps.action: Navigate to the account security settings page
steps.expected_result: Account security settings page is displayed

steps.action: Enable MFA using the provided setup process
Refresh or revisit the MFA status indicator

test_cases.expected_outcome: User sees updated MFA status as enabled after setup

test_cases.title: Check MFA status with empty user session
test_cases.description: Verify system behavior when user session is empty or expired while checking MFA status.
preconditions: User session is expired or not present

steps.action: Attempt to access the account security settings page
steps.expected_result: User is redirected to login page or prompted to authenticate

test_cases.expected_outcome: System prevents access to MFA status without valid session

test_cases.title: Check MFA status with maximum length user identifier
test_cases.description: Verify system correctly retrieves MFA status for user accounts with maximum length usernames or IDs.
preconditions: User account exists with maximum allowed username length

steps.action: Navigate to the account security settings page
steps.expected_result: Account security settings page is displayed without errors

test_cases.expected_outcome: System handles max length user identifiers without failure

test_cases.title: Check MFA status with null user identifier
test_cases.description: Verify system behavior when user identifier is null or missing during MFA status check.
preconditions: User session exists but user identifier is null or corrupted

steps.action: Attempt to access the account security settings page
steps.expected_result: System returns an error or redirects to login

test_cases.expected_outcome: System handles null user identifier gracefully without crashing

test_cases.title: Check MFA status with concurrent access from multiple devices
test_cases.description: Verify system consistency when MFA status is checked concurrently from multiple devices or sessions.
preconditions: User is logged in on multiple devices simultaneously

steps.action: From device A, navigate to account security settings and check MFA status
From device B, simultaneously navigate to account security settings and check MFA status
steps.expected_result: MFA status is displayed correctly and matches device A

test_cases.expected_outcome: MFA status is consistent across concurrent sessions

test_cases.title: Check MFA status with invalid session token
test_cases.description: Verify system denies access to MFA status when session token is invalid or tampered.
preconditions: User has an invalid or tampered session token

steps.action: Attempt to access account security settings page with invalid session token
steps.expected_result: Access is denied and user is redirected to login

test_cases.expected_outcome: System prevents unauthorized access due to invalid session token

test_cases.title: Check MFA status page for Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability
test_cases.description: Verify that the MFA status page properly sanitizes user inputs and does not allow XSS attacks.

steps.action: Inject script tags or malicious payloads into user profile fields
steps.expected_result: Payloads are sanitized and not executed on MFA status page

steps.action: Navigate to the account security settings page
steps.expected_result: No script execution or malicious behavior occurs

test_cases.expected_outcome: MFA status page is secure against XSS attacks

test_cases.title: Check MFA status API endpoint for SQL Injection vulnerability
test_cases.description: Verify that the backend API used to retrieve MFA status is not vulnerable to SQL injection.

steps.action: Send API request to MFA status endpoint with SQL injection payload in user identifier parameter
steps.expected_result: API rejects the request or returns sanitized response without executing injection

test_cases.expected_outcome: System is protected against SQL injection attacks on MFA status retrieval

test_cases.title: Check MFA status access for privilege escalation attempt
test_cases.description: Verify that a user cannot access MFA status of another user by manipulating identifiers or URLs.
preconditions: User is logged in as a non-admin user

steps.action: Attempt to access MFA status page or API for a different user's account by modifying URL or request parameters
steps.expected_result: Access is denied with appropriate error or redirect

test_cases.expected_outcome: System prevents privilege escalation and unauthorized MFA status access

test_cases.title: Check MFA status API rate limiting
test_cases.description: Verify that repeated rapid requests to MFA status endpoint are rate limited to prevent abuse.

steps.action: Send rapid consecutive requests to MFA status API endpoint exceeding rate limit threshold
steps.expected_result: API responds with rate limit error or temporarily blocks requests

test_cases.expected_outcome: System enforces rate limiting on MFA status requests to prevent abuse
